payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam indicating Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded by mem_new, and superseded memories should not be shown as current facts.

entity_resolution.reason: The query targets Sam and the returned memory is the current resolved fact linked to Sam; the older conflicting memory is marked superseded.

memory_cards.statement: An older memory about Sam was filtered because it is superseded by the newer Goldman fact and should not be presented as current.

details: Identified current memory mem_new for Sam.
Applied recall policy to exclude superseded facts from current results.

repair_options: Verify that mem_old has an explicit superseded_by link to mem_new.
Confirm mem_new is the latest valid memory for Sam on this topic.
If mem_old should still be visible, mark it historical rather than current.
If Sam is ambiguous across multiple people, split entity resolution before recall.
